title: SHADY.MOE Server Pack
body:
Simple optimization/QOL modpack for shady.moe server with some additions like emotes, voice chat and webcam support.

<details><summary>Mods used:</summary>

Main Mods:
- [AdvancementInfo Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancements-reloaded)
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)
- [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Streamotes: Streamer Emotes](https://modrinth.com/plugin/streamotes)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)

Optimization:
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

API:
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) (YACL)
</details>

<details><summary>Packs&Shaders</summary>

**Completely optional!** You can activate it by going to Resource Packs tab and use the SHADY.MOE_Vanilla_Tweaks_1.21.8 + Activating shader in the Shaders tab.
- [BSL Shaders - Classic](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders-classic)
- [Custom NEROSHAD Totem Skin](https://shady.moe/emotes/)

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Additions:

Utility:
- Visual Sapling Growth
- Visual Honey Stages
- Brewing Guide
- Music Disc Redstone Level Preview
- Hunger Preview
- Age 25 Kelp
- Different Stems
- Unique Axolotl Buckets
- Unique Painting Items
- Diminishing Tools

Fixes and Consistency:
- Big Dripleaf Stem Fix
- Nicer Fast Leaves
- Don't Eat the Bowl!
- Proper Break Particles

Fun:
- WHAT Spyglass
- Unique Dyes
- Old Damage Sound
- Alpha Minecraft Logo

GUI & Unobtrusive:
- Black Widgets
- 4-Angled Crosshair
- Colored Ping Indicator
- Rainbow Experience Bar
- Dark UI
- Borderless Normal, Tinted, Stained Glass

</details>
